description_long: This object consists of two stacked hardcover books, one black and one brown, bound together by a distinctive red and blue patterned strap. The books have thick, cream-colored pages visible along the sides, and the covers are solid with no visible illustrations or text. The strap is wide and wraps tightly around the center, adding a decorative and functional element. The spines of the books are plain, with subtle horizontal lines on the black book's spine, but no visible text or embellishments. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with a focus on the contrasting colors and the geometric strap design. The books appear to be in good condition, with sharp edges and smooth surfaces.
description: Two stacked hardcover books, one black and one brown, bound by a bold red and blue patterned strap. The books have plain covers and visible cream-colored pages.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the black book on top, the brown book beneath, and the colorful strap running horizontally across the center.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the spines of both books and the vertical red and blue strap, with subtle lines on the black book's spine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the cream-colored pages and the strap across the top.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the cream-colored pages of both books and the patterned strap running vertically down the center.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are plain, with the black book featuring subtle horizontal lines and no visible text or decorative elements. The strap partially covers the spines vertically.
